zh.Helmsley, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾爾姆斯利
zh.Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾英格曼東普
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roese de Trussebut於大約1151年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親William Trussebut32歲，母親Albreda de Harcourt38歲。她於1169年與Sir Everard de Ros在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1196年9月29日之前在英國越可爾爾姆斯利，埋葬在英國越可爾曼別。

zh-hans.Helmsley, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾爾姆斯利
zh-hans.Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾英格曼東普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roese de Trussebut于大约1151年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲William Trussebut32岁，母亲Albreda de Harcourt38岁。她于1169年与Sir Everard de Ros在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1196年9月29日之前在英国越可爾爾姆斯利，埋葬在英国越可爾曼別。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roese
meanings: A baptismal name derived, like the surname Rous, Rouse, Rowse, from Old French rous, red; from Latin rufus.

en.lifeSummary: When Roese de Trussebut was born about 1151, in Yorkshire, England, her father, William Trussebut, was 32 and her mother, Albreda de Harcourt, was 38. She married Sir Everard de Ros in 1169, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 29 September 1196, in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Hunmanby, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roese de Trussebut est née environ 1151, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Trussebut, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Albreda de Harcourt, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Everard de Ros en 1169, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 29 septembre 1196, à Helmsley, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Hunmanby, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Helmsley, Yorkshire, England: Helmsley, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Roese de Trussebut um 1151 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Trussebut 32 und ihre Mutter Albreda de Harcourt 38. Sie hat 1169 in Yorkshire, England Sir Everard de Ros geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 29. September 1196 in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Hunmanby, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roese de Trussebut è nata il circa 1151 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, William Trussebut, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Albreda de Harcourt, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir Everard de Ros nel 1169, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 29 settembre 1196, nel Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolta a Hunmanby, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roese de Trussebutが約1151年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Trussebutは32歳，母Albreda de Harcourtは38歳であった。1169年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir Everard de Rosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1196年9月29日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアヘルムスリーで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハンマンビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roese de Trussebut(이)가 대략 1151년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Trussebut(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Albreda de Harcourt(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1169년 영국 요르크실르에서 Sir Everard de Ros(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1196년 9월 29일 이전 영국 요르크실르 헬슬리에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 헌먼비에 묻혔다.

pt.Helmsley, Yorkshire, England: Helmsley, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roese de Trussebut nasceu aproximadamente 1151, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Trussebut, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Albreda de Harcourt, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Everard de Ros em 1169, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 29 de setembro de 1196, em Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Hunmanby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Helmsley, Yorkshire, England: Helmsley, North Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roese de Trussebut родилась около 1151 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Trussebut было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Albreda de Harcourt, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Everard de Ros в 1169 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 29 сентябрь 1196 г. в местности хелмсли, еркшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности хунманби, еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Everard de Ros en 1169, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 29 de septiembre de 1196, en Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Hunmanby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
